The '''Chempat Shield Generator''' was a model of [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] manufactured by [[Chempat Engineered Defenses]]. It employed several projectors to sheath a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] in a [[Deflector shield/Legends|protective shield]].<ref name="EGWT" />

[[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr's]] [[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter]] was equipped with a single Chempat generator, located at the rear of the fuselage. Power was fed to the generator by a [[Power Feed Connector]], travelling through a [[Power coupling/Legends|power coupling]] and into the [[shield matrix]].<ref name="EGWT" />

The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] used a Chempat shield generator on their [[Savage Star fighter]]s after the [[New Sith Wars]].<ref name="TJP">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>
